items.summary: A Hawaii doctor, Gerhardt Konig, has been found guilty of attempted manslaughter after a jury deliberated for two days. Konig was accused of attacking his wife, Arielle, on a hiking trail in Oahu, pushing her near a cliff and beating her with a rock. The jury found him guilty of the lesser charge of attempted manslaughter based on extreme mental or emotional disturbance, rather than the original charge of second-degree attempted murder.

items.summary: A former Fort Bragg employee, Courtney P. Williams, 40, has been arrested and charged with unlawfully transmitting national defense information to a journalist. Williams, who held a Top Secret/Sensitive Compartmented Information clearance, allegedly leaked classified military tactics and information to the journalist over several years. The leaked information, which included sensitive operational details, could pose serious risks to military personnel and compromise operations, according to authorities.

items.summary: Jim Whittaker, the first American to summit Mt. Everest, has died at the age of 97. He reached the summit on May 1, 1963, with Sherpa Nawang Gombu, and his achievement made him a hero and celebrity. Whittaker died at his home in Port Townsend, Washington, and is survived by his wife and children.

items.summary: Sean Hannity interviewed various political figures and newsmakers on his show on Wednesday, April 8. The topics discussed included the Iran ceasefire, affordable transportation, and the Decarlos Brown case. The episode, which also featured guests such as Jillian Michaels and John Fetterman, is available to stream for 7 days.

items.summary: The NYT Connections puzzle for April 9, 2026, features 16 words to be grouped into four categories. The categories are: Gloomy (words related to being "down"), Ointment, Zodiac symbols, and Muscular (minus "Ed" sound). The solution to today's Connections puzzle is: Gloomy (BLUE, DARK, DOWN, LOW), Ointment (BALM, CREAM, PASTE, RUB), Zodiac symbols (ARCHER, FISH, GOAT, RAM), and Muscular (JACK, RIP, SHRED, YOKED).
